title: D2 content-at-scale proxy (/bin/bash/LLM-free-at-measure) — gates Slice-25 (D2 engine) eligibility
status: CODE COMPLETE + gated; --full measurement DEFERRED (see deferral_rationale)

tdd.smoke: green (synthetic 16-doc wiring proof, not a measurement)

design_review: codex 3 rounds: BLOCK(removes_length_norm_penalty argmax post-selection; D0b/eligibility framing) -> cleared; final CONCERN (neutralization power guard) -> folded as TOST equivalence + underpowered=>INCONCLUSIVE. Converged.
code_review_codex9: CONCERN, not BLOCK; the one substantive point (neutralization power guard) already folded (TOST) + implemented; no code defect surfaced.

contract_honored.criterion1: paired enriched-placebo margin, fixed-seed percentile bootstrap CI, margin_ci_lo>0 + paired MDE
contract_honored.criterion2_removes_length_norm_penalty: pre-registered b_hi=0.75/b_lo=0.0 (no argmax); penalty_present:=(plain-placebo)@b_hi CI_lo>0; neutralized:=TOST (plain-placebo)@b_lo CI in [-0.03,+0.03]; underpowered=>INCONCLUSIVE (never silent True)
contract_honored.key_set_placebo_invariant: placebo token-matched to FULL key set (entities+fact triples), foreign-only, own-tokens-excluded; RED-tested
contract_honored.footprint: OFFLINE-BUILD extraction (local Qwen, pinned endpoint, fail-closed, no priced fallback); LLM-free at measure; $0; no engine/Rust change

deferral_rationale: The --full LME measurement needs a fresh Qwen GPU extraction pass (no cached LME extractions exist; only MuSiQue 0.8.2-m1-v1). Per the D0b reprioritization (accuracy gap >> recall gap => likely answer-formation, not retrieval), spending a GPU extraction on a recall-lever proxy BEFORE the cheap gap-decomposition probe confirms recall matters is premature over-investment (the design's own caveat). HOLD --full pending: (1) gap-decomposition result; (2) GPU coordination (<5% util + no sibling need); (3) per-class N from the Slice-5 re-pin manifest.
full_command: PYTHONPATH=src/python <canonical .venv python> -m eval.s15b_d2_proxy --full --per-class <N from Slice-5 manifest> --seed 20260622 --graphs <LME extractions.json from a Qwen OFFLINE-BUILD pass> --lme-endpoint <LOCAL_QWEN_URL> --lme-model <SERVED_MODEL> --db-dir /tmp/s15b-full --output dev/plans/runs/0.8.3-s15b-d2-proxy-n*.json
next_step_for_orchestrator: After D0b lands + gap-decomposition probe (HITL-gated) confirms a material retrieval component: do the Qwen LME OFFLINE-BUILD extraction (GPU <5%), run --full, codex §9 on results, write report; PASS=>Slice-25 eligible, FAIL-at-power=>defer D2, INCONCLUSIVE=>escalate. Do NOT merge now; cherry-pick after D0b (disjoint files from the sister doc edits).
